title: action.executed.v1
description: SPEC I (Wave I, AMD-03) — Action Platform envelope: an approved action was EXECUTED by its executor adapter. Registered in Apicurio as brain/action.executed.v1 (JSON Schema artifact under FULL_TRANSITIVE, AMD-03 R1). Partition key = brand_id (I-S01). SCAFFOLD ONLY — no executor emits this yet (all adapters are NotImplemented/fail-closed). execution_ref is the executor-returned handle a later action.rolled_back.v1 needs to reverse the effect (governance: no 'auto' without a per-executor rollback that can consume this handle). PII (I-S02): no raw PII; money in payload/result is bigint minor + currency_code.

brand_id.description: Tenant key — brand_id-first (I-S01). Kafka partition key.

action_id.description: The action executed (same id across its lifecycle). Idempotency key = (brand_id, action_id).

executor.description: The executor adapter that ran (matches an @brain/action-core ExecutorPort name).

execution_mode.description: Mode under which the action ran.

payload.description: The executed instruction body (money = bigint minor + currency_code; no raw PII).

execution_ref.description: Executor-returned handle identifying the produced side effect (e.g. Shopify price-rule id, audience id, message id) — the reversible token action.rolled_back.v1 consumes. Governance: a per-executor rollback MUST be able to reverse this handle before 'auto' is permitted.

approved_by.description: OPTIONAL auth-principal id of the approver (audit; present for approve/auto lineage).

holdout_group.description: OPTIONAL incrementality cohort label (enables lift measurement of the executed action).

executed_at.description: OPTIONAL ISO-8601 UTC timestamp execution completed.
